chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 60 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal 12.11.2025 Mr. Muhammad Abbas, advocate for the applicant Per office note this is a time-barred reference. No application seeking the delay to be condoned has been filed. Be that as it may, this matter has been pending since 2022 and remains listed for non-compliance of office objections and same is the case today learned counsel merely seeks time. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
